column28: Feedback for RDA: Panavision is one name this technology has gone by, but isn't the exclusive name. Note from MARC vocabulary: "Introduced and adopted for commercial use in 1953 under the name of Cinemascope, followed by Techniscope (1963), Naturama, Panavision, etc. Also used for 16 mm. film which employs this process." Suggest revising to "Anamorphic (wide-screen)" or similar. -CEY, 2025-07-30
